name: Scalp D Medicated Shampoo & Conditioner Set (Refill)
pros: Refill format reduces plastic waste and offers better long-term value than single bottles
Clinically formulated for scalp health with 15 years of Japan's #1 men's shampoo credibility
Excellent Rakuten reviews (4.59★, 970+) demonstrate consistent user satisfaction
cons: At ¥8,380, the refill set is pricey for those new to the brand without a dispenser
Refill bottles require the original pump bottle, creating vendor lock-in
shortDescription: Dermatologist-developed medicated shampoo & conditioner refill duo.
review: Scalp D is Japan's most trusted scalp-care brand for good reason—the medicated formula targets sebum control, flaking, and odor with clinical backing. This refill set is excellent value if you already use Scalp D, though newcomers should start with the single bottle (also on this list). Widely available at drugstores, supermarkets, and online; instructions in Japanese but product is straightforward to use.
